description:
You are a Computer User Support Specialist who just finished a phone call with a customer. Log this phone interaction in FreeScout (http://localhost:8080) using the credentials admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!. Create a Phone conversation (not an email conversation) in the 'IT Support' mailbox for customer David Chen (david.chen@acmecorp.com).

Subject: Network Printer Not Detected - HP LaserJet Pro M404n
Body: Customer called regarding HP LaserJet Pro M404n printer not showing up on his Windows 11 workstation. Verified printer is online and reachable at 192.168.1.45. Cleared Windows print spooler and re-added printer via IP. Printer now detected and test page printed successfully. Customer confirmed issue resolved.

metadata.expected_subject: Network Printer Not Detected - HP LaserJet Pro M404n
